title: carpinus tientaiensis
intro: Carpinus tientaiensis, also known as Tientai hornbeam, is a species of tree in the family Betulaceae, native to China. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carpinus tientaiensis include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and improving cardiovascular health. Carpinus tientaiensis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
